docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT TRANSFERRED FROM ALAMEDA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARIFZADEH, REZA AS TO DEFENDANT MEYERS, JOCELYN MEYERS, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 25 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-02-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-18-2004
FILING FEES OF $264.50 PAID BY PLAINTIFF
SEE SCANNED. REGISTER OF ACTION FROM ALAMEDA--SUPERIOR COURT FROM 6/3/03 TO 10/8/03. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARIFZADEH, REZA

NOTICE OF LIEN PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE 3850-3865; REQUEST TO BE PLACED ON PROOF OF SERVICE LIST FOR ALL PLEADINGS AND DISCOVERY FILED BY LIEN CLAIMANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND. AS TO PLAINTIFF SHARIFZADEH, REZA
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MEYERS, JOCELYN MEYERS, MICHAEL
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE COMPLAINT, ENTIRE ACTION.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-02-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
